name: Standard Patchwork Kids' Pillow Quilt Sham - Pillowfort™
description: Add playful style to the top of your child’s bed with this Standard Patchwork Pillow Quilt Sham from Pillowfort™. The quilted sham showcases a lively patchwork of mixed vibrant patterns across the front with ruffled-flange ends and a coordinating plain reverse side. Made from 100% cotton and recycled polyester backing, this machine-washable sham with a six-inch envelope closure adds comfort and functional style to their bedroom linen collection.
